name: tldw-assistant
displayName: tldw Assistant - Browser Extension for tldw_server
description: A browser extension frontend for tldw_server - your unified AI assistant with RAG, media processing, and more.
author: tldw-team

scripts.build: bun run locales:sync && bun run build:chrome && bun run build:firefox && bun run build:edge
scripts.build:chrome: cross-env TARGET=chrome wxt build && node scripts/verify-shared-token-sync.mjs --target chrome-mv3
scripts.build:firefox: cross-env TARGET=firefox wxt build -b firefox && node scripts/strip-dangerous-eval.mjs && node scripts/verify-shared-token-sync.mjs --target firefox-mv2
scripts.build:edge: cross-env TARGET=chrome wxt build -b edge && node scripts/verify-shared-token-sync.mjs --target edge-mv3
scripts.zip: bun run locales:sync && cross-env TARGET=chrome wxt zip
scripts.zip:firefox: bun run locales:sync && cross-env TARGET=firefox wxt zip -b firefox
scripts.test:e2e:workspace-parity:strict: rm -f .workspace-parity-e2e-report.json && PLAYWRIGHT_JSON_OUTPUT_NAME=.workspace-parity-e2e-report.json playwright test tests/e2e/workspace-playground.parity.spec.ts --reporter=json && node scripts/assert-playwright-no-skips.mjs .workspace-parity-e2e-report.json && mkdir -p test-results && cp .workspace-parity-e2e-report.json test-results/workspace-parity-e2e-report.json
scripts.test:e2e:workspace-parity:real:strict: rm -f .workspace-parity-real-e2e-report.json && PLAYWRIGHT_JSON_OUTPUT_NAME=.workspace-parity-real-e2e-report.json playwright test tests/e2e/workspace-playground.real-backend.spec.ts --reporter=json && node scripts/assert-playwright-no-skips.mjs .workspace-parity-real-e2e-report.json && mkdir -p test-results && cp .workspace-parity-real-e2e-report.json test-results/workspace-parity-real-e2e-report.json
scripts.test:e2e:watchlists:strict: rm -f .watchlists-e2e-report.json && PLAYWRIGHT_JSON_OUTPUT_NAME=.watchlists-e2e-report.json playwright test tests/e2e/watchlists.spec.ts --reporter=json && node scripts/assert-playwright-no-skips.mjs .watchlists-e2e-report.json && mkdir -p test-results && cp .watchlists-e2e-report.json test-results/watchlists-e2e-report.json
